title: AnswerVerifierOut
description: Schema for the JSON object returned by prompts/answer_verifier_prompt.md. Mirrors AnswerVerifierOut in crates/clawd/src/answer_verifier.rs.

pass.description: True when the final answer satisfies the task contract and observed evidence.

missing_evidence_fields.description: Semantic evidence fields still missing from the answer.

answer_incomplete_reason.description: Short stable reason when pass=false; empty when pass=true.

should_retry.description: True when another attempt can likely collect the missing evidence or correct the failure.

retry_instruction.description: Concise instruction for the next planner attempt; empty when no retry is needed.
